caption: The video features a presentation by Alejandro Saucedo at EuroPython 2018 in Edinburgh, held from July 23 to 29, 2018. The topic of the presentation is "Industrial Machine Learning: Horizontally Scalable Data Pipelines with Airflow." Alejandro, who holds various prestigious positions including CTO at Exponential Technologies, Chairman of The Institute for Ethical AI & ML, and Member of the Broader AI Expert Group at the European Commission, is seen standing behind a podium, gesturing as he speaks. The slide displayed on the screen introduces him and provides his contact information, encouraging viewers to reach out via email at A@E-X.IO. The setting appears to be a professional conference environment, with a focus on advanced data science and machine learning technologies.
